programs.label: Project Blue Book
programs.blurb: USAF's longest-running official UAP investigation program, closed after the Condon Report.

programs.label: Project Condign
programs.blurb: Classified UK Defence Intelligence Staff study of UAP, declassified 2006.

programs.label: AATIP
programs.blurb: Advanced Aerospace Threat Identification Program — Reid-funded DIA effort.

programs.label: AAWSAP
programs.blurb: Advanced Aerospace Weapon System Applications Program — DIA contract preceding AATIP scope.

programs.label: BAASS (contractor)
programs.blurb: Bigelow Aerospace Advanced Space Studies — primary AAWSAP contractor.

programs.label: UAP Task Force
programs.blurb: Navy-led task force consolidating UAP reporting; precursor to AOIMSG.

programs.label: AOIMSG / AIRWG
programs.blurb: Airborne Object Identification and Management Sync Group — short-lived bridge to AARO.

programs.label: AARO
programs.blurb: All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office — current cross-domain UAP authority.
